subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained the presence of Him whose countenance hath illumined the horizon of sanctity, and upon whom the lights have shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشرف بالمثول بین یدی من اضاء وجهه من افق التقدیس و تجلی علیه بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power of prayer, @Manifestation of God as sun
